column19: I honestly think that A.I helps me in understanding a physics concept better. Well, I start by attempting a qs in trial paper SP025. Then when I don’t understand ways to solve the qs, ill ask chatgpt to relate it to SP025 module and explain from there. From the fundamental concepts to relation on how to solve and examples, metaphor and example qs. This is my point of view on how AI should and must be use to help students understand and learn physics well.
